XenotypeDef.label: leeani
XenotypeDef.description:
After escaping a military experiment millenia ago, Leeani have made themselves a prominent presence in the galactic stage. Originally mundane foxes, their genetic modifications have allowed them many opportunities in a growing universe.

Leeani are fox-like humanoids with fluffy tails, pointed ears, and vibrant orange fur. They are naturally cheerful, adaptable, and resilient, with a cultural tendency toward pacifism and harmony. Their enhanced movement speed and dark vision make them excellent scouts, while their aversion to violence encourages them toward more peaceful pursuits.

Leeani are agile and quick but less suited for heavy labor like mining.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: Fox-like humanoids with fluffy tails and cheerful dispositions.
